full_text:
Sun Ba (Ziwei) 孫霸 (子威)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Ba (孫霸), styledZiwei (子威). He fought bitterly with his once close brother, Sun He, for succession. Forced into suicide. Sun Ba was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Ba lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
